svg.text: MILAN AVB NIC on VexiiRiscv SoC — FULL SYSTEM MAP · AX7101 xc7a100t · data flows LEFT->RIGHT (RX lane top; TX lane bottom returns to the wire) · BIG arrows = frame/bus data · thin dashed = configuration/status · big dashed = monitor copy · every address = its own cell · 2026-07-12
lanes: LE = little (tdata[7:0] = first wire byte) · BE = big (AECP parser chain only) · clocks: sys 100 / milan 100 (Arty 50) / eth 125 /
milan_datapath — fabric, cd_milan 100 MHz (Arty 50) · every AXIS hop: 64b tdata + 8b tkeep + valid/ready/last, LE unless marked BE
TX side: same core, reverse path
ATDECC control plane — zero-CPU responders (taps in, one merged control stream out)
commands: READ_DESCRIPTOR · names · config · rate · format ·
STREAM_INFO 56 B · AVB_INFO · COUNTERS 136 B (errors too) ·
builder buf_r 64 B FF · const_q 64 B FF
AEM store — BRAM 808 B (byte port 8b · addr 16b · 1 cy):
GET_TX_STATE -> SUCCESS, count=0, stream fields zeroed,
softcore policy mailbox (HW answers / SW decides)
frame buf: 72 B LUTRAM (9 beats x 8 B)
82 B ADPDU (CDL 0x38) · periodic every valid_time s
discover response · available_index +1 on EVERY ADPDU
info/gm change > discover > timer · enable-edge with
identity in = CSR 0x600 group (= AEM overlay)
o_irq_csr -> PLIC · identity fans out to
ADP + AEM + ACMP: ONE source of wire truth
RSC TCP coalescer — RING_RSC_TOUT in 100 MHz ticks
header-split v3 (fill len in w0[31:16], page <= 32 KB) ·
4-slot writer + pop-ordered CQ(8) · 60 KB order-4 buffers
flow steer: 4-tuple hash -> q0/q1 · hash_sel=1 forces q0 (BEFORE TCP)
L2 cache 64 KB shared · down-pending 8 · slots 16 (coherent DMA lands here)
PLIC + CLINT — kl-eth per-queue · milan_csr · UART · timer
coherent DMA port 64b into the L2 (--coherent-dma)
kl-eth driver (kl,dma-ether · silicon; MODULE_VERSION gates identity)
• 2 RX queues x threaded NAPI · RSC ON @250 us · hs_pgsz=16384 <-> gateware --hs-page-bytes 16384 (STRICT)
• 4-slot RX + pop-ordered CQ (wedge-free) · HW-TSO · chain-csum · ack-merge tout 512 us
• identity provisioning once/boot: devmem 0x9000_0600 group (aecp_csr_setup.sh, caps 0x8588)
• NEXT: PHC /dev/ptpN + SO_TIMESTAMPING — the gPTP gate (ARCHITECTURE_HW_SW_SPLIT.md)
linuxptp: ptp4l (802.1AS BMCA + servo) + phc2sys — in the rootfs, unvalidated until the PHC lands;
then a small bridge writes GM id/domain -> CSR 0x624/0x628 on change (fabric re-advertises, AS_PATH stays true)
PipeWire module-avb (future media plane): AAF frames -> kl-eth -> fabric CBS class-A queue ·
SRP/MSRP state machines · ACMP connection POLICY via mailbox (HW answers / SW decides)
QSPI flash N25Q128 16 MB (off-chip, flashboot slots):
validation peers via the AVB switch: milan_controller.py · la_avdecc enum-probe (Hive) · tsn-gen
descriptor fetch from the 512x8B ring — base/length in
BYTES (trap!) · AXI bursts 16-64 beats x 64b (128-512 B) ·
TX staging FIFO — BRAM 2048 beats x 64b = 16 KB
4 slots x 60 pages x 16 KB = 960 KB
